CustomField.formula: NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Gerencia__c ))) && NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Area__c ))) && NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Tecnologia__c ))) && Validacion_Crossobject_Preventa__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Required fields: Management, Area, Technology, Proyect Leader of Presales
CustomField.label: Validado para Preventa
